questions.question: In Lystra, what did the crowd try to do after Paul healed a man crippled from birth?
What names did the people of Lystra call Barnabas and Paul?
Paul was stoned in Lystra and left for dead, but got up and went back into the city.
We must enter the Kingdom of God through many _____.
They appointed _____ for them in every church, and with prayer and fasting commended them to the Lord.
